no_gaps_directive.primitive: Manual register-local unroll of the contiguous row update inside the existing safe-Rust matmul_2d i-k-j kernel.
alien_graveyard_lineage: /data/projects/.scratch/no_gaps_directive.txt calls for pure safe-Rust BLAS-class kernels and one-lever profile-backed optimization.

/data/projects/alien_cs_graveyard/alien_cs_graveyard.md identifies dense numerical kernels, cache locality, SIMD/tiled kernels, and communication-avoiding linear algebra as relevant high-leverage primitives.

profile_backed_target.bead_source: frankenjax-mcqr.27 was in_progress and assigned to IcyGlacier. It cited fresh rch Criterion re-profile evidence that matmul_2d bounded the production Dot path after pass 34.
profile_backed_target.raw_kernel_baseline_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-matmul-pass35-baseline-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_256x256x256_f64 --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1
profile_backed_target.dot_baseline_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-dot-pass35-baseline-retry-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/dot_256x256x256_f64 --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

optimization_candidate.lever: Unroll the inner contiguous j-loop in matmul_2d by 8 scalar updates plus a scalar tail.
optimization_candidate.restore_note: The source hunk was manually restored after the rebench failed the score threshold; git diff for crates/fj-lax/src/tensor_contraction.rs is empty in the final state.

candidate_after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-matmul-pass35-after-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_256x256x256_f64 --sample-size 60 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

benchmark.worker_caveat: Baseline and candidate were both remote RCH Criterion measurements but landed on different workers. The candidate was slower than the already tight pre-edit baseline and produced no same-worker proof of a real win, so the source lever was rejected.

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Candidate intended to preserve row-major output and the same per-cell ascending l contribution order; no source change was kept.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A. matmul_2d has no comparisons or ties.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate used the same scalar multiplication and addition expression for each cell and passed the bit-identity unit test, but it was rejected for performance and restored.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A. matmul_2d is deterministic and consumes no random state.

validation.result: blocked by unrelated pre-existing rustfmt diff in crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs; target file diff was empty after restore

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-matmul-pass35-test-20260603 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax matmul_2d_ikj_bit_identical_to_ijk -- --nocapture
validation.result: pass for candidate before restore; 1 passed, 1008 filtered out

notes: No file was deleted. No stash, reset, clean, checkout, or destructive cleanup was used.
A delegated worker attempt for this pass failed before editing due API 429 rate limiting; the orchestrator used the skill fallback and applied the pass locally.
